basic_details.job_title: AWBI Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI) Legal Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.awbi.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AWBI Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Law from Recognised University/College, Registered Advocate in Bar Council of India or State Bar Council, Minimum 5 years experience in Legal matters related to PCA Act, 1960, Work experience in Govt. Offices/Autonomous Bodies as Legal Advisor/Consultant related to Animal Welfare Laws, Experience in appearing before District Courts, High Courts and Supreme Courts
qualification.details: Masters in Law from a Recognised University/College. Registered as an Advocate in the Bar Council of India or State Bar Council. Minimum 5 years of experience in Legal matters related to PCA Act, 1960 & allied legal procedure. Work experience in Govt. Offices/Autonomous Bodies as Legal Advisors/Consultants related to Animal Welfare Laws. Experience in appearing before District Courts, High Courts, and Supreme Courts in Government Matters. Good knowledge of English, drafting, computer applications, and LIMBS portal.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AWBI Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.awbi.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AWBI Legal Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AWBI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AWBI Legal Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AWBI Legal Advisor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Masters in Law from a Recognised University/College. Registered as an Advocate in the Bar Council of India or State Bar Council. Minimum 5 years of experience in Legal matters related to PCA Act, 1960 & allied legal procedure. Work experience in Govt. Offices/Autonomous Bodies as Legal Advisors/Consultants related to Animal Welfare Laws. Experience in appearing before District Courts, High Courts, and Supreme Courts in Government Matters. Good knowledge of English, drafting, computer applications, and LIMBS portal.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AWBI Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.awbi.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AWBI Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AWBI Legal Advisor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Legal Advisor post at the Animal Welfare Board of India is 21st August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Legal Advisor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters in Law from a recognized university and be registered as an Advocate with the Bar Council of India or a State Bar Council. Experience in animal welfare laws and court appearances is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Legal Advisor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Legal Advisor post is 40 years. No specific minimum age limit has been mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Legal Advisor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Legal Advisor at the Animal Welfare Board of India through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the AWBI Legal Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Legal Advisor recruitment at AWBI.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this? Contract or Permanent?
faq.answer: The Legal Advisor position at the Animal Welfare Board of India is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Legal Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Legal Advisor position will primarily involve shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their applications and qualifications.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Animal Welfare Board of India, which is www.awbi.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the completed application form is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the notification PDF for the exact mailing address.
